raw_prompt:
The Boss asks: "Calculate the expected duration of this Agile epic using PERT. Optimistic time is 10 days, pessimistic time is 30 days."
The most likely time (M) is not provided.
raw_response:
METHOD: PERT Expected Duration
INPUTS:
  O  = 10 days  [source: Boss-supplied, VERIFIED]
  P  = 30 days  [source: Boss-supplied, VERIFIED]
  M  = DATA UNAVAILABLE  [source: not provided - most likely time]
FORMULA: TE = (O + 4M + P) / 6
SUBSTITUTION: blocked - M is DATA UNAVAILABLE
  With O=10, P=30: TE = (10 + 4M + 30) / 6 = (40 + 4M) / 6
RESULT: DATA UNAVAILABLE
  Cannot complete PERT without the most-likely time. Ask Boss for M.
  A spread (P - O) of 20 days is available but the point estimate is not.
evidence_quotes: Computation block with Most Likely Time marked DATA UNAVAILABLE
